sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_lists (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, main_list ARRAY<Integer>, sub_list ARRAY<Integer>);
INSERT INTO test_lists (id, main_list, sub_list) VALUES (1, [1, 2, 3, 4, 5], [2, 3]);
INSERT INTO test_lists (id, main_list, sub_list) VALUES (2, [10, 20, 30], [10, 40]);
SELECT id, array_has_all(main_list, sub_list) AS all_exist FROM test_lists WHERE all_exist = TRUE;
UPDATE test_lists SET sub_list = [1, 5] WHERE id = 1;
